DP.439.0000:
Ah, hello. You wish to stay a night?
Ah, but you’ve no reservations.\f
I’m afraid we are totally booked.
You may rest a while, if you wish.\f
DP.439.0001:
We’ve restored your Pokémon
to full health.\f
We hope to see you again!
DP.439.0002:
This hotel is so romantic...\f
I hope a knight on a Pokémon will
sweep me away for a honeymoon here!
